zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Phelice de Vere於1280年出生在英國艾可時，她的父親Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford23歲，母親Margaret Mortimer24歲。她於大約1309年與Sir William Berkerolles在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世在威爾士蒙姆爾巴薩利格，埋葬在英國威爾斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根聖 阿森。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Phelice de Vere于1280年出生在英国艾可时，她的父亲Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford23岁，母亲Margaret Mortimer24岁。她于大约1309年与Sir William Berkerolles在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世在威尔士蒙姆爾巴薩利格，埋葬在英国威尔斯瓦爾 本 格拉莫爾根聖 阿森。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Phelice de Vere was born in 1280, in Essex, England, her father, Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Mortimer, was 24. She married Sir William Berkerolles about 1309, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales, and was buried in Saint Athan, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Phelice de Vere est née en 1280, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mortimer, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Berkerolles environ 1309, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée à Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Galles, et a été enterrée à Saint Athan, Vale of Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1309 in Glamorgan, Wales Sir William Berkerolles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb in Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Saint Athan, Vale of Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Phelice de Vereが1280年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxfordは23歳，母Margaret Mortimerは24歳であった。約1309年にウェールズグラモーガンでSir William Berkerollesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女はウェールズモンモウスシュアイアバッサレグで死去し，イギリスウェールズベル オフ グラモーガンサイント アサンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church Of Saint Athan, Barry, Vale Of Gl: 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 세인트 앳핸
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Phelice de Vere(이)가 1280년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Mortimer(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1309년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Sir William Berkerolles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 몬모우스실르 배사일그에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 발 프 글램르건 세인트 앳핸에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Phelice de Vere nasceu em 1280, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mortimer, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Berkerolles aproximadamente 1309, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em Bassaleg, Monmouthshire, Gales, e foi sepultada em Saint Athan, Vale of Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Church Of Saint Athan, Barry, Vale Of Gl: сеинт атань, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Phelice de Vere родилась в 1280 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mortimer, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Berkerolles около 1309 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в местности бассеилег, монмоутшир, Уэльс и была похоронена в местности сеинт атань, веил оф глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.
